codeReview.summary: The cross-page polish feature correctly addressed both scrutiny-discovered issues: (1) direction-detail.html label changed from '14天变化' to '时间窗口' to match the time_window data field semantics, and (2) CSS variable --color-judgment-xuyaobuzhengjyu renamed to --color-judgment-xuyaobuzhengju with all references updated across 4 files (style.css, components.js, index.html, direction-map.html) — zero stale references remain. The README.md is comprehensive, covering all required topics (setup, pages, data explanation, relationship to report.html, future phases). No English UI labels leak into user-facing text. Console errors verified as 0 on all 5 pages via agent-browser. One non-blocking issue found: the homepage 今日判断 module displays only 3 of the 4 judgment states (missing 观察中), even though the data file contains '观察中': 1. This is a pre-existing issue from the homepage build feature, but the cross-page polish feature's description explicitly required verifying 'judgment state vocabulary (值得跟, 观察中, 短热噪音, 需要补证据) is used consistently across ALL pages' — the worker's handoff incorrectly claims this was verified as consistent.

issues.description: Homepage 今日判断 module only renders 3 judgment states (值得跟, 短热噪音, 需要补证据) — missing 观察中. The HTML at lines 48-61 has 3 divs for the 3 states but no div for 观察中 with its blue color. The JS renderJudgmentSummary function (line 222-225) also only updates 3 count elements, missing count-guanchazu. The data file has '观察中': 1 in today_judgments. The feature description explicitly requires verifying all 4 judgment states are consistent across all pages. This pre-existing omission should have been caught and fixed by this polish pass.

sharedStateObservations.observation: AGENTS.md documents the 4 judgment states with color coding, and the feature correctly implements the CSS variable rename. However, the homepage HTML was built in a prior feature with only 3 judgment state rows in the 今日判断 module, and the cross-page polish pass did not catch it despite the verification checklist requiring all 4 states be present on all pages. This suggests AGENTS.md could benefit from an explicit note like 'The 今日判断 module on index.html MUST display all 4 judgment state counts' to prevent this from being missed again.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: dashboard/index.html lines 48-61 show 3 judgment divs (值得跟, 短热噪音, 需要补证据) but no 观察中 div. dashboard/data/jade_dashboard.json line 11 has '观察中': 1.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The prototype-worker skill procedure says to 'Verify via accessibility snapshot that Chinese text is present' and 'Check for console errors', but doesn't explicitly instruct workers to enumerate and cross-reference all 4 judgment states against every page's rendering. Adding a cross-page consistency checklist item like 'Confirm all 4 judgment states appear in every module that displays judgment counts' would help future polish passes catch omissions like the missing 观察中.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: Skill SKILL.md Content checks section lists general checks but no specific enumeration of the 4 states per page. Worker transcript shows browser-based verification but the accessibility snapshot approach doesn't reliably catch a missing HTML element vs a present-but-empty one.

summary: PASS with one non-blocking issue. Both scrutiny-discovered fixes (time window label, CSS variable rename) were correctly applied. README.md is comprehensive and well-structured. No regressions introduced. All 5 pages verified clean (0 console errors, Chinese-only UI). The one non-blocking issue: homepage 今日判断 module is missing the 观察中 judgment state row — a pre-existing omission from the homepage build that this polish pass was expected to catch but didn't. The worker's handoff incorrectly claims all 4 judgment states are consistent across all pages. This does not warrant a fail since the feature's core deliverables (fix 2 scrutiny issues + create README) were accomplished correctly, and the missing 观察中 is a pre-existing cosmetic gap rather than a regression.
